headline: Amphenol (APH) Stock May Be Slightly Rich As AI Demand Builds
summary: After a very strong 5 year run, Amphenol’s share price now sits in a zone where the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and the earnings multiple checks both suggest the stock is roughly fairly valued rather than clearly cheap or clearly expensive. Amphenol has returned 369.1% over 5 years, which puts extra focus on whether today’s price still leaves enough room for investors to be comfortable with the current valuation. Recent coverage has highlighted growth linked to AI...
